name: Lone Star Ribs and BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the ribs with the above mixture.
2. Place ribs on the grill in any type of covered smoker or BBQ pit, keeping away from direct heat so that the smoke does the cooking.
3. Cook very slowly for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until meat comes away from bone easily.
4. During the last 15 minutes, baste both sides of ribs with sauce.
5. Cut ribs and serve.
To make sauce:
1. Combine ketchup and water in a large pot and bring to boil.
2. Mix dry ingredients.
3. Add mustard, liquid smoke, and half the Worcestershire sauce. Stir into paste.
4. Then add the remainder of Worcestershire sauce. Stir until combined.
5. Pour this mixture into the heated ketchup and water mixture and stir gently.
6. Bring to a simmer and cook slowly for 20 minutes.
7. Refrigerate any unused portion. Keeps for several weeks. Makes about 1 quart.
